title: Feature-delivery harness — wire CursorRunner through run and advance
summary: This delivery wires feature-delivery to an opt-in Cursor SDK path shared by run and advance, while manual mode remains the default operator flow. It also resolves real personas, loads repo-root .env, executes SDK-backed stage work through a compiled one-stage slice, and records SDK outcomes in the run log without…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and implementation surface. After human accepts this index artifact, run pan advance to complete, then delegate the generated complete-stage prompt for…
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts/ directory under feature folder; review used behavioral delta coverage only.
intake.human_approval_note: Spec ratified at plan advance per state.json advanceHistory intake→plan event.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
